_authority.purpose: Machine-readable ordered climb from current scorecard (~6.4) to definition-of-10. Never-stop and agents honor open items first. Scorecard narrative: docs/SYSTEM_SCORECARD_PATH_TO_10.md

definition_of_10.ux: FOUNDER_USABILITY_PASS true; Point B Consumer Alpha closed
definition_of_10.gates: SENTRY Layer A+B green on Marketing, LifeOS, Site Builder

items.title: Keep never-stop shipping
items.done_when: Scheduler burns pending BUILD_QUEUE steps; tip tracks main; no spin receipts

items.title: First dollar
items.done_when: Validated dollar receipt (Site Builder send or Go Vegas conversion)
items.next_action: Confirm EMAIL_* / Postmark on Railway; run prospect send OR Go Vegas discover under caps
items.blocker: May need EMAIL_FROM/EMAIL_PROVIDER values if launch-readiness flips; GO_VEGAS_ALLOW_DISCOVER_IDLE for idle discover

items.title: Point B / founder usability
items.done_when: FOUNDER_USABILITY_PASS true on Point B mission
items.next_action: Run lifeos:user-auth:v1-acceptance; founder confirm-usability on lifeos-app
items.blocker: Human usability confirm required for full close

items.title: SENTRY Layer B core surfaces
items.done_when: Marketing + LifeOS founder-ui + Site Builder Layer A+B PASS receipts

items.title: Founder memory every Chair turn
items.done_when: loadChairMemoryContext injects FOUNDER MEMORY block on normal chair/lumin turns
items.next_action: Deploy tip with inject; prove live Chair turn cites FOUNDER MEMORY / receipt

items.title: Factory FULLY_MACHINE_READY
items.done_when: bp-priority-coverage-audit gaps=0; SAME_TIER determinism; FULLY_MACHINE_READY true; then GOVERNED_FACTORY_ONLY
items.next_action: Coverage gaps=0 DONE; run factory:certify + same-tier determinism; then flip GOVERNED_FACTORY_ONLY
items.blocker: Do not flip GOVERNED_FACTORY_ONLY until SAME_TIER + governed ship proven

items.title: Buildable backlog only
items.done_when: Priority products have shippable BUILD_QUEUE steps or stamped unplannable SENTRY
items.next_action: Document next phases as backlog bullets; planner commits or stamps

items.title: Deploy truth
items.done_when: Step done only when running tip serves built SHA; tip always = main
items.next_action: Watch deploy-proof on never-stop steps; managed-env build-from-latest after ship

items.title: Honesty fence
items.done_when: Zero overclaim; every blocker named; money-path security review receipt
items.next_action: Keep truth-enforcement audit green; no PASS without receipt

items.title: One paying segment loop
items.done_when: Repeatable Go Vegas or Site Builder paying loop with receipt
items.next_action: After first dollar, schedule recurring under caps
